AXI-Lite Specification v1.0

1. Overview
The AXI-Lite module implements sub-portions of memory mapped channels.

2. Interface Signals
- aclk: 1-bit input clock
- aresetn: 1-bit active-low reset
- awaddr: 32-bit input write address
- awvalid: 1-bit input write address valid
- awready: 1-bit output write address ready
- wdata: 32-bit input write data
- wvalid: 1-bit input write data valid
- wready: 1-bit output write data ready
- bresp: 2-bit output write response
- bvalid: 1-bit output write response valid
- bready: 1-bit input write response ready

3. FSM States
The AXI controller uses a 4-state FSM: IDLE, AW_PHASE, W_PHASE, B_PHASE

4. Register Map
- 0x000: ctrl_reg (32-bit) - RW - Reset: 0x00000000 - Control register
- 0x004: status_reg (32-bit) - RO - Reset: 0x00000002 - Status indicator
